  • weekly picks (May 2 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 May 2nd week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score : 20234

    2605.06752v1 Quantum spin liquid on a 3D bipartite lattice of spin trimers stabilized by enhanced effective anisotropy (arXiv)

    • Score : 17584

    2605.13274v1 Electron - acoustic phonons scattering in quantum wells in a tilted quantizing magnetic field (arXiv)

    • Score : 17430

    2605.11965v1 Staggered spin susceptibility at a two-dimensional antiferromagnetic quantum critical point (arXiv)

    • Score : 17425

    2605.13978v1 Generalized Model Fractional Quantum Hall States on Lattices (arXiv)

    • Score : 17393

    2605.08162v1 Nonlinear Coherent Transport in 2D Thermal Metamaterials: From Solitons and Topological Defects to Quantum Computing (arXiv)

    • Score : 16492

    2605.12184v1 Local Topological Quantum Order and Spectral Gap Stability for the AKLT Models on the Hexagonal and Lieb Lattices (arXiv)

    • Score : 15762

    2605.14214v1 Spin Hall effect in electronic Levy glasses: Enhanced spin current generation in the superdiffusive regime (arXiv)

    • Score : 14932

    2605.11249v1 Optical signatures of antiferromagnetic correlations in a strongly interacting quantum Hall MoSe2 monolayer (arXiv)

    • Score : 14764

    2605.09885v1 Spin Seebeck effect in magnetic junctions with a compensated ferrimagnet (arXiv)
